rulings.Case Title: CLAUDE LAWS VS. ELMO MUGNANI et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn For Judgmnt On The Pleadings
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, October 22, 2014 line 1, DEFENDANTS ELMO MUGNANI, JOHN MUGNANI and LAW OFFICES OF BORNSTEIN & BORNSTEIN (SUED AS Mtn For Judgmnt On The Pleadings Denied. Complaint alleges sufficient facts regarding landlord and landlord's agents/attorneys failure to arrange for the retrieval of Plaintiff's personal property after an eviction. Complaint is not so uncertain that defendants cannot answer it.= (501/GLW)

rulings.Case Title: ANDREA MAYFIELD et al VS. BALDWIN FRANK MYERS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, October 22, 2014 line 2. CROSS DEFENDANT JONATHAN FRIED's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND Continued to November 19, 2014. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of the moving papers to department 501 no later than October 30, 2014 by 4:00 p.m. with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date.= (501/GLW)

rulings.Case Title: ALVIN BENJAMIN CHONG VS. AARON BARTON CHONG et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, October 22, 2014 line 3. DEFENDANT AARON CHONG's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Continued to November 7, 2014. Parties shall resubmit courtesy copies of the moving papers, opposition and reply to department 501 no later than October 24, 2014 by 4:00 p.m. with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date.= (501/GLW)

Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6C no later than October 22, 2104 by 9:00 a.m. and deliver a courtesy copy of the operative complaint department 501 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date.= (501/GLW)

rulings.Case Title: JEFFREY LAU et al VS. BONY TSANG et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Order Of Dismissal; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities, Declarations Of Harold E Hand
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, October 22, 2014 line 8. Plaintiff's Motion To Vacate Order Of Dismissal; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities, Declarations Of Harold E Hand Granted. Harold E. Hand shall remit $600 to the Court pursuant to CCP 473(c)(1)(A) within 30 days. Plaintiff shall prepare order. = (501/GLW)

rulings.Case Title: MCCORMACK BARON RAGAN MGMT. SERVICES, INC. VS. TERRY MATHEWS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order To Enforce Settlement Agreement And Enter Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, October 22, 2014 line 9. PLAINTIFF MCCORMACK BARON RAGAN MGMT. SERVICES, INC.'s Motion For Order To Enforce Settlement Agreement And Enter Judgment Hearing required re: inspection. = (501/GLW)

rulings.Case Title: ISA MUHAWIEH VS. BOAZ MARILES et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notie Of Motion For Attorneys' Fees
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, October 22, 2014 line 5. PLAINTIFF ISA MUHAWIEH's Motion For Attorneys' Fees Hearing required. Plaintiff is ordered to provide a courtesy copy of the proof of service for the Motion for Attorney's Fees by 9:00 a.m. on October 22, 2014. = (501/GLW)

rulings.Case Title: XELAN PROP I LLC VS. MARIA MARANGHI et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, October 22, 2014 line 6. DEFENDANT MARIA MARANGHI's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Overruled, 5 days to answer. Complaint and notice sufficiently allege an unlawful detainer based on nuisance. Defendant cites no authority for the proposition that affording a tenant an opportunity to cure nuisance renders the notice ineffective/invalid. Defendant's counsel is ordered again (See CUC-13-646128 9/5/13; CUD-13-346270 10/11/13) to comply with SFLR 2.6C in future.= (501/GLW)

rulings.Case Title: EQUITY GROWTH ASSET MANAGEMENT VS. KIMBERLY K.A. CHIN
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, October 22, 2014 line 7.DEFENDANT KIMBERLY CHIN's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT Denied, 5 days to answer. Allegations in the complaint must be taken as true for the purposes of the motion to strike. Complaint sufficiently alleges that the document attached as exhibit 1 is a true and correct copy of the recorded document. Whether or not it is true is an issue of fact not properly addressed at this stage of litigation.= (501/GLW)
